[Under a Shining Moon, Crimson shade of Hide and Seek Event]

A new Event has begun!
Participate for 5 days in a row and receive special gifts!

🗓️Period: 9/8 (Thu) 3:00 AM - 9/18 (Sun) 3:00 AM (UTC)
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/100932
